name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Calendar now shows confirmed, checked-in, and checked-out bookings.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.89: Calendar now shows checked_in and checked_out bookings alongside confirmed.
  • 1.9.2.88: Booking detail form now editable — booking-wide note textarea, room-note input per room. Add-booking: room-note field added. Day-specific notes no longer wiped on booking save. Calendar only shows day-specific notes per cell (no fallback).
  • 1.9.2.87: ICS sync no longer reuses guests by phone+name match — each unique booking gets its own guest.
  • 1.9.2.86: Calendar year navigation — prev/next year arrows keep same month, switch year. AJAX loading supported.
  • 1.9.2.85: Room closures now editable — Edit link in Actions column, form pre-fills dates/reason/room, Cancel returns to blank form.
  • 1.9.2.84: New guest_preferences table + admin UI. Guest lookup (name/email/phone search) on add-booking page auto-fills form. Preferences shown on booking detail page. ICS import no longer pollutes guests.notes. create_wp_crm_booking() accepts optional guest_id to update existing guests.
  • 1.9.2.83: Fix nonce failure causing blank page — replaced check_admin_referer with manual wp_verify_nonce. Date auto-advance wrapped in DOMContentLoaded for reliability.
  • 1.9.2.82: Auto-advance date_to picker after choosing date_from. Darker closed cell bg (#999).
  • 1.9.2.81: Calendar closed cells — room-name row not greyed out, darker grey bg, closure reason shown in guest field.
  • 1.9.2.80: Room Closures page — room selector dropdown for single-room close, bulk delete with checkboxes.
  • 1.9.2.79: Fix room closures table not being created — bumped DB version to 23, added runtime table check in admin page, added database error reporting, closures now included in ICS exports.
  • 1.9.2.78: Room closures feature — new admin page, calendar shows closed days, availability check rejects bookings on closed dates.
  • 1.9.2.77: Booking detail page — narrow commission header to 'Comm', remove 'Remove' label from each row, widen A/C/BB inputs to 55px.
  • 1.9.2.76: Fix room removal from bookings — legacy_reserved_room_id collision when re-inserting rooms after delete. Now computes next ID from both sync_bookings and booking_rooms tables.
  • 1.9.2.75: Optimize duplicate checker — batch all room/guest queries upfront, fix room codes not displaying.
  • 1.9.2.74: Show room codes instead of room count in duplicate checker for easier identification.
  • 1.9.2.73: Add booking duplicate checker admin page and WP-CLI tool for cleaning up ghost/duplicate bookings.
  • 1.9.2.72: Fix duplicate booking creation — filter out empty source_booking_id from booking_groups query, preserve source_booking_id on admin save, and skip unresolvable room groups earlier in ICS import.
  • 1.9.2.71: Add debug-ics REST endpoint and sync_stats diagnostics for ICS feed debugging.
  • 1.9.2.70: Room-independent ICS import — booking_groups grouped by (external_booking_id, room_sync_id, external_room_id) so each room's ICS feed creates its own booking and guest. Booking/guest lookups JOIN on booking_rooms with room_id to prevent cross-room matches. Stale zero-data booking_rooms from other rooms are cleaned when enriched booking is found. Overlap fallbacks removed.
  • 1.9.2.69: Fix booking overlap — booking overlap fallback now requires exact source_booking_id match instead of matching any booking_com booking in the same room on overlapping dates. Each new ICS reservation creates its own booking.
  • 1.9.2.68: Fix guest reuse — guest overlap fallback now requires exact source_booking_id match. Each new ICS reservation creates its own guest.
  • 1.9.2.67: Fix multi-room bookings — enriched booking found by source_booking_id no longer COMMIT+continues before the room processing loop, so additional rooms from the same reservation (same external_booking_id) get added as new rooms. Existing rooms are preserved by the dedup check.
  • 1.9.2.66: Fix enriched bookings treated as skeletons — strip [ICS_SKELETON] marker from internal_notes on admin save and when detected as enriched in import. Prevents enriched bookings from being rebuilt with zero ICS data on re-sync.
  • 1.9.2.65: Fix skeleton detection — check actual enriched data (adults, amounts, booking_note, room-line amounts) instead of relying solely on the [ICS_SKELETON] marker, which is never removed from internal_notes after enrichment. Enriched bookings are no longer treated as skeletons.
  • 1.9.2.64: Fix ICS re-sync — skeleton bookings now update dates, rebuild rooms, recalculate totals on re-import. Filter source_channel='booking_com' at query level to prevent orphaned guests from non-booking_com sync rows.
  • 1.9.2.63: Fix Booking.com ICS feed URLs not saving — save handler was gated behind 'general' tab, but form fields are on 'booking-com' tab. POST data silently discarded. Added dedicated save handler for booking-com tab.
  • 1.9.2.62: Add fullscreen button to calendar page — fixed-position button on right side toggles browser fullscreen. Hides admin sidebar and toolbar in fullscreen mode. Uses delegation so button survives calendar month navigation.
  • 1.9.2.61: Fix 500 error — create checkout AFTER action COMPLETED (in polling callback) instead of alongside CONFIRMATION action. await_next_action:true keeps terminal awaiting so queued checkout triggers card prompt immediately. Previously checkout creation was in ticket-show-bill (caused 500 because Square rejects creating checkout while action in progress on same device).
  • 1.9.2.60: Pre-create TerminalCheckout in ticket-show-bill alongside CONFIRMATION action (with await_next_action:true). Checkout is queued before user taps OK. Terminal awaits next action after CONFIRMATION and picks up checkout immediately — card prompt appears. JS polls checkout_id directly instead of action_id.
  • 1.9.2.59: Pre-create TerminalCheckout in ticket-show-bill alongside CONFIRMATION action (with await_next_action:true). Checkout is queued before user taps OK. Terminal awaits next action after CONFIRMATION and picks up checkout immediately — card prompt appears. JS polls checkout_id directly instead of action_id.
  • 1.9.2.58: Add close button (×) to ticket panel header — deselects booking, returns to full-width catalog.
  • 1.9.2.57: Fix footer off-screen — 100vh includes browser chrome in windowed mode on tablets. Set #app height to window.innerHeight (actual visible height). Recalc on resize and fullscreen change.
  • 1.9.2.56: Normal-flow footer (not absolute) inside ticket panel. Panel is flex child of .main (not absolute). Removes all height-propagation ambiguity — footer always at panel bottom.
  • 1.9.2.55: Fix footer clipped by overflow:hidden — main was missing position:relative so panel referenced viewport (100vh). Toggle panel margin via .panel-visible class. Hide panel initially in HTML.
  • 1.9.2.54: Absolute position ticket panel (top:0;right:0;bottom:0) — guarantees deterministic height, fixes footer off-screen on all browsers.
  • 1.9.2.53: Absolute position ticket footer at panel bottom. Add close button to pay modal.
  • 1.9.2.52: Add min-height:0 to .main and .ticket-panel — fix footer buttons pushed off-screen.
  • 1.9.2.51: Remove await_next_action from CONFIRMATION action — was keeping action in limbo, preventing COMPLETED status and checkout chain.
  • 1.9.2.50: Fix device_id placement in CreateTerminalAction — must be a direct field of the action object, not device_options sub-object or top-level.
  • 1.9.2.49: Fix Square API error 'action.device_options is unrecognized' — device_id must be at top level of CreateTerminalAction request.
  • 1.9.2.48: Add error div inside pay modal — pay flow errors were hidden behind modal overlay.
